About Us

Where Vision Meets
Craft

At Patil Architectural and Interiors, we bring ideas to life through innovative design, practical planning, and high-quality construction. We specialise in creating functional, aesthetic, and sustainable spaces that reflect our clients' vision and lifestyle.

With a strong foundation in architecture and interior design, we deliver complete solutions — from concept to completion — ensuring quality, precision, and customer satisfaction at every step.

Residential Commercial Minimalist Luxury Vastu-Based Turnkey AutoCAD SketchUp
Patil A&I
Architects · Interior Designers · Builders · Bagalkot


Start Your Project
What We Do

Complete Design
& Build Solutions

Four integrated disciplines. One seamless experience. From first sketch to final handover — everything under one roof.

01 / 04
🏠

Architectural Design

Comprehensive building design that marries structural integrity with aesthetic distinction — from initial concept to approved drawings ready for construction.

  • Residential & commercial planning
  • 2D drawings & 3D elevation design
  • Vastu-based planning
  • Approval & permit drawings
↗
02 / 04
👓

Interior Design

Spaces crafted with purpose and beauty — whether a warm family home or a sleek corporate office, we design for how you truly live and work.

  • Home interiors (living room, kitchen, bedroom)
  • Modular kitchen & wardrobe design
  • Office & commercial interiors
  • Space planning & furniture layout
↗
03 / 04
🏗

Construction Services

End-to-end construction management with engineering precision — quality materials, rigorous supervision, and transparent budgeting from day one.

  • Turnkey construction projects
  • Site supervision & project management
  • Quality material selection
  • Cost estimation & budgeting
↗
04 / 04
🖥

3D Visualization

Experience your space before a single brick is laid. Photo-realistic renders and immersive walkthroughs that eliminate guesswork and build confidence.

  • Realistic 3D renders
  • Walkthrough & flythrough videos
  • Exterior & interior visualization
↗

Why Choose Us

Five Reasons Clients
Choose Patil A&I

We don't just design spaces — we build lasting relationships. Our commitment to quality, transparency, and creativity sets us apart across Karnataka.

  • ✓

    Creative & Modern Design Solutions

    Trend-aware yet timeless — our designs are fresh and distinctive without chasing fads that expire.

  • ✓

    Affordable Pricing with Quality Work

    Premium results at realistic prices. We optimize every rupee without compromising on material or finish standards.

  • ✓

    On-Time Project Delivery

    We respect your timeline. Milestones are set, tracked, and met — every single time, without exception.

  • ✓

    Fully Customized Designs

    No templates. Every design is built uniquely around your lifestyle, taste, and budget.

  • ✓

    Expert Tools & Technology

    AutoCAD, SketchUp, V-Ray — industry-leading precision tools delivering industry-leading results.

Design Philosophy

Built to Inspire.
Designed to Last.

Our architectural approach draws from the finest global design traditions while remaining rooted in the Karnataka context — climate, culture, Vastu principles, and local craftsmanship all play a role in every decision we make.

We believe the best buildings are not just beautiful — they work in harmony with nature, maximise light and air, and age gracefully with their owners.

01Roof overhang & layered facade for shade and drama
02Vertical wood screens for privacy and texture
03Natural stone cladding for warmth and longevity
04Solid balcony with planters — biophilic living spaces
05Tropical landscaping for a serene, resort-like feel

Interior Excellence

Luxury Interiors
That Speak for Themselves

Our interior design team combines deep spatial knowledge with an eye for the extraordinary. Every room we design is a composition — materials, light, texture, and proportion working in perfect harmony.

From sleek modular kitchens to opulent master bedrooms, wardrobe systems to living room centrepieces — we craft interiors that feel both aspirational and liveable.


Discuss Your Interiors
From Plan to Reality — We Handle Everything
Our Process

From Blueprint
to Beautiful

We start where great buildings start — with a clear, intelligent plan. Our detailed 2D drawings and 3D models give you total clarity on your project before a single rupee is spent on construction.

📑
2D Floor Plans
Precise AutoCAD drawings with accurate dimensions and layout.
📻
3D Elevations
Photorealistic exterior and interior renders for full visualisation.
🌟
V-Ray Renders
Studio-quality lighting and material simulation for every space.
🎬
Walkthrough Videos
Immersive flythrough animations so you can experience the space.

Get Your Plans Done

🕪

Our Vision

To become a trusted name in architecture and interior design by delivering innovative, sustainable, and client-focused solutions across Karnataka and beyond. We envision buildings that inspire communities and designs that outlast generations.

M
🎯

Our Mission

Driven by three core commitments:

  • Design spaces that are both beautiful and functional — never compromising one for the other
  • Maintain the highest standards of quality and professionalism at every stage of every project
  • Build long-term client relationships rooted in trust, transparency, and outstanding results

Client Stories

Stories of Satisfaction

Patil A&I transformed our house into a dream home. The team understood exactly what we wanted — the Vastu alignment, the open feel, and the warm materials. Delivered on time and within budget. Couldn't ask for more from any design firm.

R
Ramesh Kulkarni
Villa Owner, Bagalkot

The 3D visualization blew us completely away — we could see our entire office before construction began. The final result matched the render down to the last detail. The team is professional, creative, and genuinely listens.

S
Shweta Patil
Business Owner, Hubli

We had a tight budget but Patil A&I made us feel like royalty. The modular kitchen and master bedroom they designed is something our friends always comment on. Absolutely unmatched quality for the price.

A
Anand & Meena Desai
Apartment Owners, Dharwad

From the very first meeting to the final walkthrough, the Patil A&I team was responsive, transparent, and incredibly skilled. Our commercial showroom has received more footfall since the redesign — design truly matters.

V
Vijay Shetty
Showroom Owner, Bijapur
